name: Almond Tea Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Allow butter to come to room temperature.
2. Finely chop the blanched almonds.
3. In a medium mixing bowl, sift together flour and confectioners sugar.
4. Cream butter, sugar, vanilla, almond extract, salt, and cinnamon until well combined.
5. Add the flour mixture and stir in the chopped almonds. Chill if necessary to make firmer before shaping.
6. Roll level teaspoons of the dough into balls and place a few inches apart on ungreased cookie sheets.
7. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 10 - 12 minutes, or until lightly golden.
8. Using a spatula, remove cookies to wire racks immediately.
9. Roll in extra confectioners sugar before serving.
10. Store in a tightly covered tin box. Makes 2 1/2 to 3 dozen cookies.
